name: Cranberry Sauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Sift together the flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt in a mixing bowl.
3. Reserve 1/4 cup of cranberry sauce and set aside.
4. Stir the remaining cranberry sauce, pecans, mayonnaise or salad dressing, orange rind, and orange juice into the dry ingredients. Mix well until combined.
5. Turn in the greased 13x9x2-inch pan (in inches) with the batter.
6. Bake for 45 minutes.
7. While the cake is baking, mix the reserved 1/4 cup of cranberry sauce, butter or margarine, and confectioners sugar until creamy.
8. Spread the mixture over the warm cake.
